name: Bacon-Cheese Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour freshly popped corn into a large bowl.
2. Combine the margarine with hickory-smoked salt in a separate container.
3. Pour the melted margarine mixture over the popcorn and toss well to coat evenly.
4. Sprinkle the cheese and bacon bits over the popcorn.
5. Toss everything together until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
6. Serve warm.
